name: Pots De Creme Pie Mdtw57a
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Chocolate (dark bittersweet Belgian or semisweet)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler over medium heat, combine chocolate, heavy whipping cream, and half and half.
2. Cook until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is hot, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and beat in egg yolks one at a time, stirring constantly and carefully to avoid curdling.
4. Continue beating until the mixture is shiny and thickened.
5. Cool slightly.
6. Pour into prepared Graham Cracker crust.
7. Cool, then refrigerate overnight.
8. Dollop with whipped cream and sprinkle with slivered chocolate.
Makes 12 servings.
Suggestion: Enjoy with an ice cold glass of whole milk. Indulge yourself. A good cup of coffee is good with this too. This is a very rich pie. Enjoy!
